stories.title: Harden charged with unlawful carrying of weapon
stories.summary: Cavaliers guard James Harden was arrested early Saturday morning in Houston and has been charged with a misdemeanor unlawful carrying of a weapon.

stories.title: Pereira 251 pounds for UFC Freedom 250 at WH
stories.summary: MMA star Alex Pereira tipped the scales at 251 pounds Saturday, just over 24 hours before he meets Ciryl Gane for the heavyweight title at UFC Freedom 250 at the White House on Sunday night.

stories.title: Police dress as World Cup mascots for drug raid
stories.summary: Police in Peru took a novel approach to clamping down on drug trafficking on Wednesday as they conducted a raid in Lima disguised as the 2026 World Cup mascots.

stories.title: Dempsey slams Marsch over anthem: Stay in lane
stories.summary: United States legend Clint Dempsey had some choice words for former national team assistant Jesse Marsch, who suggested Thursday that some American players needed encouragement to sing the anthem ahead of games.

stories.title: Balogun living WC 'dream' as U.S. choice pays off
stories.summary: USMNT striker Folarin Balogun, who could have played for England or Nigeria, said his two goals in Friday's 4-1 World Cup victory over Paraguay made for a "dreamy night."
